data.name: 快穿拼圖·美少女和我的夏天
data.detailed_description:
欢迎加入我们

QQ群：1050630131

关于此游戏

拼圖 + 戀愛模擬

你在沙灘上邂逅幾位性格、身份各不相同的女孩：
有人是在攤位打工的女大學生，有人是認真負責的救生員，還有安靜經營小店的創作者……
每一次相遇，都會被記錄成一張照片，而這些照片會在你的手中被切成拼圖。

完成拼圖，就能解鎖新的對話、選項和事件，慢慢接近她們真正的心情。

玩法特色

  • 拼圖還原照片

    • 將一張張海邊日常、約會瞬間切成拼圖塊

    • 透過旋轉、拼接完成畫面，難度適中、節奏輕鬆

    • 隨流程逐步提升複雜度，保持一點「小挑戰」

  • 多位女主，各有性格

    • 元氣愛笑、慢熱溫柔、酷酷又會撩……

    • 不同角色擁有各自獨立的小故事線與專屬 CG

    • 同一場景在不同選擇下，也會呈現出截然不同的氛圍

  • 遊戲玩法

    • 使用特殊技能幫助你完成拼圖

    • 還要把它們打亂、組合以及配對，創建自己的組合

    • 完成每幅拼圖以收集物品

    • 檢視圖中所有已經解鎖的場景

    • 50+ 全动态劇情關卡

    • 全對話語音

data.short_description: 在夏日海邊，透過拼圖還原一張張照片，解鎖與不同女孩的邂逅與對話。輕量拼圖＋戀愛模擬，多位女主、全語音。
data.supported_languages:
英文, 日文*, 簡體中文, 繁體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: 2 Ghz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 10.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

data.name: THROUGH TIME·SUMMER OF GIRL PUZZLE
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to join us

Join our Discord

About the game

Puzzle + Romance Sim

On a summer beach, you run into several girls with very different personalities and backgrounds.
A college student working part-time at a stall, a diligent lifeguard, a quiet creator running her own little shop…
Every encounter is captured in a photo – and those photos are cut into puzzle pieces in your hands.

Complete the puzzles to unlock new conversations, choices, and events, and slowly get closer to how they really feel.

Features

● Restore photos with jigsaw puzzles

  • Slice everyday beach moments and date snapshots into puzzle pieces

  • Rotate and connect pieces to complete the image, with moderate difficulty and a relaxing pace

  • Complexity gradually increases as you progress, keeping a small but steady challenge

● Multiple heroines with distinct personalities

  • Cheerful and energetic, gentle and slow to warm up, cool but secretly flirty…

  • Each heroine has her own little storyline and exclusive CGs

  • The same scene can feel completely different depending on the choices you make

● Gameplay

  • Use special skills to help you complete puzzles

  • Shuffle, combine, and match pieces to create your own arrangements

  • Collect items by finishing each puzzle

  • Review all the scenes you’ve already unlocked in the gallery

  • More than 50 sets of fully dynamic CG jigsaw puzzles

  • Full voice-over for all dialogues

data.supported_languages:
English, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 7
  • Processor: 2 Ghz Dual Core
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Graphics card supporting DirectX 10.0
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
